title: erysimum ochroleucum subsp. neumannii
intro: Erysimum ochroleucum subsp. neumannii, also known as Neumann's wallflower, is a plant species within the family Brassicaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, infections, and respiratory problems, due to its potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting tissue repair. Erysimum ochroleucum subsp. neumannii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
